near_threshold_file_status.revisit_condition: Revisit if the file crosses 1,500 lines or gains a new large class/function violation.

provider_class_split_status.owner_note: Provider activation safety is more important than shaving this adapter below 75 lines.
provider_class_split_status.reason: Fixture/live market enrichment adapter is below file-size gates and tightly coupled to request budgeting and no-live defaults.
provider_class_split_status.revisit_condition: Revisit when watchlist market enrichment gains another provider implementation.

provider_class_split_status.owner_note: Keep current timeout/429 behavior stable; public-provider noise is expected.
provider_class_split_status.reason: No-key public provider is fail-soft and only slightly over the advisory limit.
provider_class_split_status.revisit_condition: Revisit when adding a second GDELT mode or durable request ledger.

provider_class_split_status.owner_note: Split only when another prediction-market provider is added.
provider_class_split_status.reason: Small no-key prediction-market provider keeps fixture/live parsing in one stable adapter.
provider_class_split_status.revisit_condition: Revisit when Polymarket Gamma support grows beyond the current parser.

provider_class_split_status.owner_note: Keep feed failure semantics stable unless adding a reusable RSS client layer.
provider_class_split_status.reason: RSS/Atom adapter is tightly coupled to per-feed fail-soft behavior and source normalization.
provider_class_split_status.revisit_condition: Revisit when project-blog sources get persistent request ledgers or richer feed classes.

storage_mixin_exception_status.owner_note: DB schema behavior must not change in this cleanup pass.
storage_mixin_exception_status.reason: SQLite migration ownership is intentionally centralized to avoid untested schema drift.
storage_mixin_exception_status.revisit_condition: Revisit only with explicit migration tests and backup/restore verification.

storage_mixin_exception_status.owner_note: Avoid splitting storage write paths without SQLite roundtrip parity tests.
storage_mixin_exception_status.reason: Signal persistence methods share schema assumptions, row serialization, and outcome lookup behavior.
storage_mixin_exception_status.revisit_condition: Revisit when storage schema v2 or a repository layer is introduced.

storage_mixin_exception_status.owner_note: No DB schema or paper/watchlist behavior changes in this architecture-maintenance pass.
storage_mixin_exception_status.reason: Watchlist persistence methods are stable DB helpers and only slightly exceed the advisory limit.
storage_mixin_exception_status.revisit_condition: Revisit when watchlist storage grows new tables or migrations.

accepted_production_files_over_1200_line.reason: Static architecture report aggregator preserving compatibility aliases and existing gate counters.
accepted_production_files_over_1200_line.revisit_condition: Split when adding a new architecture report family or when report schema v2 removes historical aliases.

accepted_production_files_over_1200_line.reason: Static deleted-shim/tombstone registry and report writer; large by design and non-behavioral.
accepted_production_files_over_1200_line.revisit_condition: When deleted-shim reporting can be split from old-import linting without changing gate output.

accepted_production_files_over_1200_line.reason: Dense operator audit renderer with many cross-section helper dependencies.
accepted_production_files_over_1200_line.revisit_condition: When audit sections are split with golden Markdown fixture comparison.

accepted_production_files_over_1200_line.reason: Verdict scoring and live-confirmation policy share many ordered caps and guardrails.
accepted_production_files_over_1200_line.revisit_condition: When verdict snapshots cover each opportunity level and cap reason.

accepted_production_files_over_1200_line.reason: Historical CLI report compatibility binder with broad scanner-service monkeypatch expectations.
accepted_production_files_over_1200_line.revisit_condition: When config/report command bodies move to focused service modules.

accepted_production_files_over_1200_line.reason: Route-gate decision logic is dense and behavior-critical for no-send notification eligibility.
accepted_production_files_over_1200_line.revisit_condition: When route-decision/gate snapshots cover every lane and quality-gate cap.

accepted_production_files_over_1200_line.reason: Central environment/config contract; splitting risks import-time default and env-var behavior drift.
accepted_production_files_over_1200_line.revisit_condition: When a dedicated config-v2 migration freeze and env snapshot tests exist.

accepted_production_files_over_1200_line.reason: Stable argparse flag bundle; splitting individual flag groups risks CLI default drift.
accepted_production_files_over_1200_line.revisit_condition: Next parser feature addition or when event-alpha flag groups can be snapshot-tested per submodule.

accepted_production_files_over_1200_line.reason: Provider/cache enrichment flow is stable and below blocker threshold.
accepted_production_files_over_1200_line.revisit_condition: When adding a new enrichment source or cache policy.

accepted_production_files_over_1200_line.reason: Legacy notification-plan compatibility core; no-send semantics are more important than churn.
accepted_production_files_over_1200_line.revisit_condition: When notification plan rows are covered by schema-level golden fixtures.

accepted_production_files_over_1200_line.reason: Deterministic derivatives crowding evaluator with tightly coupled fixture smoke coverage.
accepted_production_files_over_1200_line.revisit_condition: When adding a new derivatives metric family or crowding class.

accepted_production_files_over_1200_line.reason: Outcome maturation/report code is stable and below the blocker threshold.
accepted_production_files_over_1200_line.revisit_condition: When outcome performance views gain new sections.

transitional_compatibility_cores.next_work: Move focused command families out of scanner_api.py in smaller parity-tested passes.
transitional_compatibility_cores.reason: Moved historical scanner command body; old root scanner is now a facade.

transitional_compatibility_cores.next_work: Move remaining unregistered checks into focused doctor plugins with counter-preserving fixtures.
transitional_compatibility_cores.reason: Preserves strict/WARN artifact doctor semantics while plugin migrations continue.

commands.command: PYTEST_DISABLE_PLUGIN_AUTOLOAD=1 python3 -m pytest tests/event_alpha tests/rsi tests/cli tests/test_indicators.py -q
